sections.paragraph:
f.-

(1) prop. subst. conjunction, communion (from the root עָמַם No. 1). It is only found in const. state עֻמַּת (once Ecc 5:15); elsewhere לְעֻמַּת; with suff. לְעֻמָּתִי, once לְעֻמֹּות Eze 45:7 prep. i.q. עִם.-(a) at, by, near, Exo 25:27 28:27 .-(b) against, Eze 3:8.-(c) over against, 1Ch 26:16.-(d) equally with, even as (i.q. עִם No. 1, e), 1Ch 24:31 26:12 Ecc 7:14 whence Ecc 5:15, כָּל־עֻמַּת “altogether in the same way, as” (compare כָּל־עֹוד Job 27:3). With two prefixes מִלְּעֻמַּת near, 1Ki 7:20.

(2) [Ummah], pr.n. of a town in the tribe of Asher; only found Jos 19:30.
